overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting two characters in a wooden canoe navigating a calm canyon river during deep twilight. The camera follows from behind as they paddle between towering rocky cliffs under a dark blue sky, with smooth water reflecting the dim ambient light.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon river passage with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: paddling the canoe steadily through the calm water, navigating the canyon river from the rear position

notable_agents.action: companion seated in the front of the canoe, facing forward toward the canyon exit

entered.detail: small wooden canoe with two occupants moving through the water
tall layered rock cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
rocky shoreline with sloped terrain on the right side
smooth reflective water surface mirroring the dark blue sky and cliffs
narrow opening between the canyon walls where the river continues

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a wooden canoe through a narrow canyon river at twilight. Two characters occupy the vessel—the player paddling from the rear and a companion seated forward. Towering rock walls flank both sides at a distance, while the calm water creates mirror-like reflections of the deep blue sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon river passage with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: continuing to paddle forward as the canyon walls draw closer on both sides

notable_agents.action: companion remains seated in the bow, observing the narrowing canyon ahead

segments.scene_description: The journey continues through the canyon as the rock walls gradually close in, transitioning from distant formations to prominent mid-range features. The canoe maintains its steady course through the glassy water, with the surrounding cliffs now displaying more detailed texture and stratification in the dim blue hour light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide canyon river that gradually tightens as the surrounding rock walls close in. It begins with a third-person view following a wooden canoe carrying two characters through calm, mirror-like waters that reflect a deep blue twilight sky. As the vessel maintains its steady course, the distant rock formations shift into prominent mid-range features that flank the river more closely. The scene then transitions to a more intimate perspective of the canyon, where the dim blue hour light reveals the detailed texture and stratification of the encroaching cliffs.
